title: AI Engineer
description: Looking for an experienced AI Engineer to build scalable LLM applications and RAG pipelines using FastAPI and LangGraph. AWS experience is a plus.

title: GenAI Engineer
description: Join our AI research team to develop generative models and integrate them into enterprise software. Requires Python, FastAPI, and strong background in LLMs.

title: Python AI Developer
description: Seeking a Python developer with focus on AI to work on real-time data processing. Experience with Kafka and AWS preferred.

title: Full Stack AI Engineer
description: We need a Full Stack Engineer who can build robust backends with FastAPI and responsive frontends with React and TypeScript, while integrating AI features.

title: LLM Engineer
description: Help us build the next generation of conversational AI. Strong knowledge of LangChain/LangGraph, RAG, and vector databases required.

title: Senior AI Systems Engineer
description: Architect and deploy scalable AI infrastructure on AWS. Strong experience with Python, Docker, and distributed event streaming like Kafka.

title: AI Product Engineer
description: Work closely with product teams to embed AI into our platform. Must know React, TypeScript, and how to interface with Python AI services (FastAPI).

title: Machine Learning Engineer (RAG)
description: Specialized role focusing on improving our internal RAG systems. Minimum 3 years experience with productionizing ML models.
